name: Login Add Multiple Medicines And Checkout
fullName: Apollo 24/7 End To End Journey: Login Add Multiple Medicines And Checkout

steps.name: When User logs in with valid mobile number
And User searches and adds multiple medicines to cart
Then User proceeds to checkout successfully
